parameters.jsCode:
const source = $items('Prepare Blog Data', 0, 0)[0].json;
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json || {});
const allItems = Array.isArray(source.allItems) ? source.allItems : [];
if (!allItems.length) throw new Error('Prepare Blog Data did not provide any normalized RSS items.');

const postedKeys = new Set(
  rows
    .filter((row) => String(row.processedAt || '').trim() !== '')
    .map((row) => String(row.dedupeKey || '').trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
);

const selectedItem = allItems.find((item) => !postedKeys.has(String(item.dedupeKey || '').trim())) || null;
const allAlreadyPosted = !selectedItem;
const selectedKey = selectedItem ? String(selectedItem.dedupeKey || '').trim() : '';

return [{ json: {
  ...(selectedItem || {}),
  allItems,
  rssItemCount: Number(source.rssItemCount || allItems.length),
  postedKeyCount: postedKeys.size,
  allAlreadyPosted,
  alreadyPosted: false,
  lookupMatchedKey: allAlreadyPosted ? 'ALL_ITEMS_ALREADY_POSTED' : '',
  sheetRowCount: postedKeys.size,
  dedupeStatus: allAlreadyPosted ? 'all_already_posted' : 'new_post',
  remainingUnpostedCount: Math.max(allItems.length - postedKeys.size, allAlreadyPosted ? 0 : 1),
  selectedItemPosition: allAlreadyPosted ? -1 : allItems.findIndex((item) => String(item.dedupeKey || '').trim() === selectedKey),
  testMode: Boolean(source.testMode),
  postNow: Boolean(source.postNow),
  linkedInPersonUrn: source.linkedInPersonUrn || '',
  linkedInOrgUrn: source.linkedInOrgUrn || '',
  postAsOrg: Boolean(source.postAsOrg),
  authorUrn: source.authorUrn || '',
  status: allAlreadyPosted ? 'ALL_FEED_ITEMS_ALREADY_POSTED' : source.status,
  workflowPhase: source.workflowPhase || '',
  sourceFeed: source.sourceFeed || '',
  companyName: source.companyName || 'Patchifi',
  profileName: source.profileName || 'Patchifi',
  previewProfileLabel: source.previewProfileLabel || '',
  aiMode: source.aiMode || 'auto',
  groqModel: source.groqModel || 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile',
  ollamaModel: source.ollamaModel || 'qwen2.5:7b',
  aiProvider: source.aiProvider || 'groq',
  generatedAt: source.generatedAt || '',
  approvalStatus: source.approvalStatus || 'preview_only',
  nextAction: allAlreadyPosted
    ? 'Every RSS item currently in the feed is already present in the Google Sheets dedupe log, so nothing new will be previewed or posted.'
    : (source.nextAction || '')
}}];

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Every RSS item currently available in the feed is already present in the Google Sheets dedupe log, so the workflow stopped before the LLM and LinkedIn steps.

parameters.text:
=Write about ONE specific situation, process, problem, or feature mentioned in the Summary.

Write in a practical, experienced voice for IT and security peers.
Use a short, realistic story-like flow when the Summary supports it:
start with a recognisable moment, decision, or situation;
show what goes wrong or becomes difficult;
then land on one clear practical point.

You may use “Imagine…” only when it creates a concrete, source-supported scenario.
Do not use “Imagine…” as a default opening.
Never invent a person, company, incident, customer, personal experience, statistic, or outcome to make the story more interesting.

Do not claim personal experience, customer experience, or Patchifi experience unless it appears explicitly in the Summary.
Do not write “I have seen,” “we have seen,” “our customers,” “we use,” or similar claims.

messageValues.message: Return valid JSON only. Never copy the example. Never use a phrase from the banned list.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: AI response could not be parsed into a LinkedIn post draft. The workflow now falls back to a safe structured draft when parsing fails.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: {
  latestTitle: item.latestTitle || '',
  latestLink: item.latestLink || '',
  latestGuid: item.latestGuid || '',
  latestPubDate: item.latestPubDate || '',
  latestCreator: item.latestCreator || '',
  previewSummary: item.previewSummary || '',
  imageUrl: item.imageUrl || '',
  imageType: item.imageType || '',
  dedupeKey: item.dedupeKey || '',
  lookupMatchedKey: item.lookupMatchedKey || '',
  sheetRowCount: Number(item.sheetRowCount || 0),
  alreadyPosted: Boolean(item.alreadyPosted),
  aiHook: item.aiHook || '',
  aiBody: item.aiBody || '',
  aiHashtags: item.aiHashtags || '',
  aiHashtagsArray: Array.isArray(item.aiHashtagsArray) ? item.aiHashtagsArray : [],
  aiCaption: item.aiCaption || '',
  linkedInPostText: item.linkedInPostText || '',
  linkedInPostPreview: item.linkedInPostPreview || '',
  linkedInPersonUrn: item.linkedInPersonUrn || '',
  linkedInOrgUrn: item.linkedInOrgUrn || '',
  postAsOrg: Boolean(item.postAsOrg),
  authorUrn: item.authorUrn || '',
  testMode: Boolean(item.testMode),
  postNow: Boolean(item.postNow),
  approvalStatus: item.approvalStatus || 'preview_only',
  status: item.status || '',
  workflowPhase: item.workflowPhase || '',
  dedupeStatus: item.dedupeStatus || '',
  parseStatus: item.parseStatus || '',
  qualityWarnings: Array.isArray(item.qualityWarnings) ? item.qualityWarnings : [],
  wordCount: Number(item.wordCount || 0),
  characterCount: Number(item.characterCount || 0),
  hashtagCount: Number(item.hashtagCount || 0),
  generatedAt: item.generatedAt || '',
  ollamaModel: item.ollamaModel || '',
  aiProvider: item.aiProvider || 'groq',
  aiProviderUsed: item.aiProviderUsed || item.aiProvider || 'groq',
  aiModelUsed: item.aiModelUsed || '',
  fallbackTriggered: Boolean(item.fallbackTriggered),
  fallbackReason: item.fallbackReason || null,
  nextAction: item.nextAction || ''
}}];

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Post was published to LinkedIn and the dedupe row was saved to Google Sheets.

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json || {};
const warnings = Array.isArray(item.qualityWarnings) ? item.qualityWarnings : [];
const humanPreview = [
  'PREVIEW READY',
  '',
  `Mode: ${item.testMode ? 'preview only' : 'posting allowed'}`,
  `Image included: ${item.previewHasImage ? 'Yes' : 'No'}`,
  `Article title: ${String(item.previewTitle || item.latestTitle || '')}`,
  `Article link: ${String(item.previewLink || item.latestLink || '')}`,
  `Parse status: ${String(item.parseStatus || '')}`,
  `Warnings: ${warnings.length ? warnings.join(' | ') : 'None'}`,
  '',
  'Next: open the Preview Browser Link node output.'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: {
  status: 'PREVIEW_READY_NOT_POSTED',
  message: 'Preview completed successfully. Because testMode is true, the workflow stopped before LinkedIn posting.',
  testMode: Boolean(item.testMode),
  postNow: Boolean(item.postNow),
  dedupeStatus: String(item.dedupeStatus || ''),
  parseStatus: String(item.parseStatus || ''),
  qualityWarnings: warnings,
  linkedInPostText: String(item.linkedInPostText || ''),
  previewTitle: String(item.previewTitle || item.latestTitle || ''),
  previewLink: String(item.previewLink || item.latestLink || ''),
  previewImageUrl: String(item.previewImageUrl || ''),
  previewHasImage: Boolean(item.previewHasImage),
  previewSummary: String(item.previewSummary || ''),
  previewHumanReadable: humanPreview,
  previewBrowserUrl: String(item.previewBrowserUrl || '')
}, binary: $input.first().binary || {}}];

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { ...item, aiProviderUsed: 'groq', aiModelUsed: item.groqModel || 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', fallbackTriggered: false, fallbackReason: item.groqHardFailure ? 'Groq mode selected; Ollama fallback intentionally disabled.' : null } }];

const item = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { ...item, aiProviderUsed: 'ollama', aiModelUsed: item.ollamaModel || 'qwen2.5:7b', fallbackTriggered: true, fallbackReason: 'Groq had a real API/empty/unparseable response failure while aiMode was auto.' } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first();
return [{ json: { ...item.json, imageSource: 'rss-image-generation-disabled', generatedImageStatus: 'disabled', generatedImagePreviewUrl: '', imageGenerationNote: 'Image generation disabled by workflow setting.' }, binary: item.binary }];
